items.title: Tech Bosses Tell Trump They’ll Pay Up for Electricity
items.description: Big Tech’s decision to foot more of the electricity bill has begun to benefit companies that provide power and their stocks.

items.title: Heavy Machinery Stocks Q4 Teardown: Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) Vs The Rest
items.description: Wrapping up Q4 earnings, we look at the numbers and key takeaways for the heavy machinery stocks, including Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT) and its peers.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Charges Higher As U.S. Sinks Iran Ships; Retailer Tumbles On Tariffs (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones index slipped early Wednesday amid Iran and tariff news but rebounded in afternoon trade. Nvidia stock and Tesla bounced back from recent losses.

items.title: Dow falls 800 points as oil prices resume their march higher: Live updates
items.description: Traders caught their breath after a strong performance in the previous session and kept an eye on oil rising prices.

items.title: Caterpillar Trades at Premium Valuation: How to Play the Stock?
items.description: CAT posts record Q4 revenue and rising earnings estimates, but tariffs and premium valuation may temper gains for new investors.
